symptoms.symptom_name: Prolonged crushing/gripping retrosternal chest pain at rest, unrelieved by rest/position

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Prolonged crushing rest pain unrelieved by rest is a cardinal feature of acute MI.

symptoms.symptom_name: Radiation to the left arm and jaw

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Arm/jaw radiation is a classic ischaemic feature.

symptoms.symptom_name: Autonomic shock - diaphoresis, pallor, vomiting, sense of impending doom

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Profound autonomic activation accompanies a large evolving infarct.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute myocardial infarction with LV dysfunction
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Breathlessness suggests acute ischaemic left-ventricular dysfunction/early pulmonary congestion.

symptoms.symptom_name: S4 gallop, tachycardia, weak pulses, early bibasal crackles

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: An S4 and early crackles reflect acute ischaemic ventricular dysfunction.

symptoms.symptom_name: ST-segment elevation on ECG with elevated troponin

investigation_details.expected_result: ST-segment elevation in a coronary territory with a rising troponin, confirming STEMI
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: STEMI cannot be confirmed and reperfusion (primary PCI) cannot be triggered.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: ST elevation with troponin rise confirms STEMI and mandates immediate reperfusion.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Prolonged crushing rest chest pain radiating to the left arm/jaw with diaphoresis, vomiting, impending doom and breathlessness is a textbook STEMI requiring an immediate ambulance for primary PCI, chewed aspirin, stillness and CPR readiness.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Detects ST elevation to trigger primary PCI; done urgently in a monitored setting.
Confirms myocardial injury and supports risk stratification.
Definitive reperfusion for STEMI - the reason for cath-lab pre-notification and immediate transfer.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Waiting to see if the pain settles / a routine GP review
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Any delay in a STEMI increases myocardial loss and the risk of fatal arrhythmia.
